text.tspan: Mount Propagation: Shared vs Private Demo
Why MS_PRIVATE is Mandatory for Container Isolation

div.p: MS_SHARED: Mount events propagate bidirectionally • Container mount → visible to host • Host mount → visible to container • SECURITY RISK: Information leakage
MS_PRIVATE: No propagation at all • Complete isolation of mount tree • Required for container security • Used with MS_REC for recursive application
Why Mandatory? • Prevents mount namespace leaks • Stops container mounts appearing on host • Blocks host mount changes in container • Essential for pivot_root() safety
